text: Boy in blue and red jacket holding a baseball bat.
A long train sitting on top of a set of train tracks.

A young person is drinking some water on a sunny day.
Two giraffes standing next to each other next to a fence.
Looking up at a skate board rider rolling on concrete

A white bathroom with tiled floor and sliding door
